--- is_source.sql
(a AND b) IS SOURCE (e OR f)

--- AST
&ast.IsSourceExpr{
  Of:   -1,
  Left: &ast.ParenExpr{
    Rparen: 8,
    Expr:   &ast.BinaryExpr{
      Op:   "AND",
      Left: &ast.Ident{
        NamePos: 1,
        NameEnd: 2,
        Name:    "a",
      },
      Right: &ast.Ident{
        NamePos: 7,
        NameEnd: 8,
        Name:    "b",
      },
    },
  },
  Right: &ast.ParenExpr{
    Lparen: 20,
    Rparen: 27,
    Expr:   &ast.BinaryExpr{
      Op:   "OR",
      Left: &ast.Ident{
        NamePos: 21,
        NameEnd: 22,
        Name:    "e",
      },
      Right: &ast.Ident{
        NamePos: 26,
        NameEnd: 27,
        Name:    "f",
      },
    },
  },
}

--- SQL
(a AND b) IS SOURCE (e OR f)
